primaryItems.label: Full BWV export
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Full BWV export (see MG6C/010) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Full BWV export referred on schedule but not attached.

primaryItems.label: Full custody record
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Full custody record (see MG6C/011) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Full custody/PACE material needed beyond the served extract.

primaryItems.label: Interview audio
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Interview audio (see MG6C/013) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Outstanding on current disclosure — chase before fixing hearing position.

primaryItems.label: Interview transcript
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Interview transcript (see MG6C/014) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Outstanding on current disclosure — chase before fixing hearing position.

primaryItems.label: PACE safeguards detail
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide PACE safeguards detail (see MG6C/015) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Full custody/PACE material needed beyond the served extract.

safeCourtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that custody extract is served, BWV is referred only, and full custody record and interview material remain outstanding.
